posts.author: REGR (René Grøn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Adding subitems using a form

We are adding projects (items) in MONDAY using forms.
When we have updates / changes on a project, we would like to handle it as subitems.

We would like our clients to add subitems from a form.
Can that be done? And how does the subitem get matched with the correct item?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi René!

Unfortunately I do not believe what you are asking for is currently possible.

You could possibly submit an idea here so that the monday team may see it.

I know this is a feature many have requested over the years and I hope it will soon become available.

Cheers,
Giannis
Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
